name: International Street
description: The main entrance area and central hub of Kings Island.

name: Coney Mall
description: An area inspired by Cincinnati's historic Coney Island amusement park.

name: Rivertown
description: A frontier-themed area featuring several major roller coasters.

name: Planet Snoopy
description: Family and children's area themed to the Peanuts characters.

name: Camp Snoopy
description: Expansion of the children's area with outdoor adventure theming.

name: Action Zone
description: Thrill ride area created from the former Safari and Hanna-Barbera sections.

name: Area 72
description: Sci-fi themed area centered around Orion and Flight of Fear.

name: Adventure Port
description: Adventure-themed area replacing the former Oktoberfest identity.

name: Oktoberfest
description: German-themed area that was later transformed into Adventure Port.

name: Hanna-Barbera Land
description: Original children's area themed to Hanna-Barbera characters.

name: Nickelodeon Universe
description: Children's area themed to Nickelodeon characters.

name: Nickelodeon Central
description: Nickelodeon-themed family area that preceded Nickelodeon Universe.

name: Safari
description: Animal safari attraction area that later became part of Action Zone.
